Hardware Component File

4WD_C1Axx_SW1.5_V0

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference 4WD_C1Axx_SW1.5_V1.0_20220323T155646.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 748
Receive ID 768
Functional Addr 1E
Functional Name 4WD

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "255",
    "supplier": "GKN Driveline International GmbH",
    "soft": "SW1.0",
    "version": "REL3.0.0"
  }
]
